description_long: This is a rectangular vending machine with a predominantly blue and gray front panel, featuring a large, stylized logo of two red cows and the text 'Blue Cow' in bold white and yellow letters. The front face includes a vertical control panel on the right side, which houses a series of buttons, a payment interface, and a product retrieval slot near the bottom. The sides of the machine are mostly black with a diagonal blue accent and a partial view of the cow logo and branding text. The back of the machine is plain black with no visible features or openings. The overall construction appears to be metal, with a hard, smooth, and slightly glossy finish, typical of urban vending machines. The machine is designed to be free-standing and robust, suitable for placement in public spaces such as sidewalks, parks, or building lobbies.
description: A blue and gray vending machine with a prominent 'Blue Cow' logo, control panel, and product slot on the front, and plain black sides and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full 'Blue Cow' logo, control panel with buttons, payment interface, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a partial, rotated 'Blue Cow' logo and branding text on a blue and black background.
description_view_2: Rear view, entirely plain black with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view with a partial, rotated 'Blue Cow' logo and branding text on a blue and black background.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular display panel is located on the upper right section of the front control panel, appearing as a dark, possibly digital screen.
attribute_payment_interface: A vertical payment interface is present on the right side of the front panel, featuring a coin slot, bill acceptor, and possibly a card reader.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual rectangular buttons is located on the right side of the front panel, each labeled with different product options.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, horizontal slot with a metallic frame is located near the bottom center of the front panel.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large 'Blue Cow' branding with two red cow silhouettes and the text 'Blue Cow OFF BRAND ANTIGEN DRINK' in white, yellow, and red, prominently displayed on the front and partially on both sides.
